message:
test: add coverage test suites across 6 packages (3,051 lines)

New pure/unit test files closing coverage gaps identified during
concurrent agent test-writing sessions:

- internal/bv: bv_pure_helpers_test.go (360 lines) — helper function
  unit tests for the beads viewer subsystem
- internal/cli: 5 test batches (cli_helpers_extra, helpers_batch2–5,
  1,551 lines total) — exhaustive CLI helper coverage including edge
  cases for argument parsing, output formatting, and error paths
- internal/clipboard: clipboard_extra_test.go (229 lines) — clipboard
  integration edge cases
- internal/pipeline: deps_extra_test.go (306 lines) — dependency
  resolution and pipeline ordering tests
- internal/scanner: coverage_gaps_test.go (386 lines) — scanner
  accuracy and boundary condition tests
- internal/swarm: parser_pure_test.go (219 lines) — pure parsing
  logic tests for swarm configuration

All tests are additive with no changes to production code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
